content_type.description: Type of Minecraft content to package.

output.description: Output file path for the generated archive (e.g. "output/MyAddon.mcaddon").

bp.description: Name of the behavior pack directory in the project.

rp.description: Name of the resource pack directory in the project.

world.description: Name of the world directory in the project.

skin_pack.description: Name of the skin pack directory in the project.

compression_level.description: Zip compression level from 0 (store only) to 9 (maximum compression).

stored_extensions.description: File extensions stored without compression. Defaults to common binary formats: .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .ogg, .fsb, .zip, .mcpack, .mcaddon, .mcworld, .mctemplate, .mceditoraddon.

update_version_from_tag.description: Derive the archive version from the latest git tag.

pathmap.description: Required when content_type is "custom". Maps source directory names to their paths inside the archive.
